AR1.justification: Triage logged in daybook/2026-05-17.md (correct chronological surface); explicitly named why decisions.md and observations.md were left untouched (no commitment, no cross-cutting pattern), and deferred followups.md status mutation until the chase actually goes out.

AR2.justification: Non-procedure scenario (cold-pickup triage), so artifact-binding does not apply.

AR3.justification: References to `daybook/2026-05-17.md` and `followups.md` use relative paths with ISO date anchors that resolve cleanly.

AR4.justification: Only action is creating today's dated daybook entry (date-keyed, would no-op or be obvious on re-run); deliberately left followups.md status fields unchanged so future sessions can append `chased once` / `escalated` without conflict.
